en: Venezuelans dig with bare hands for earthquake survivors [premium]. Volunteers are organizing help in the particularly affected province of La Guaira. The deployment of the state rescue services got off to a slow start - and revealed the desolate state of the infrastructure.
la: Venezuelans nudis manibus ad terrae motus residuos fodit. Voluntarii auxilium ordinant in provincia praesertim affectata La Guaira. Instructio rei publicae subsidiorum officia lento initio discessit - et statum infrastructurae desertam patefecit.
